name: Obscurity-Is-Dead
description: Research-as-code repository for the paper 'AI-Assisted Hacking: Key to Interoperability or Security Nightmare?'. Contains the paper sources (paper/main.md, paper/main.tex), case-study artifacts, AI conversation transcripts, methodology, logbook, and FAIR/citation metadata.

contributor.name: Claude (Opus 4.7 model family)
contributor.description: AI assistant used in preparation of this work. Conversation transcripts are committed under experiments/*/raw_conversations (copy&paste, web)/.

funding: This work was carried out in the author's personal capacity, without external funding. It is not part of, endorsed by, or representative of the views of any employer, including DLR (Deutsches Zentrum für Luft- und Raumfahrt).

referencePublication.name: AI-Assisted Hacking: Key to Interoperability or Security Nightmare?
